title: matoniaceae
intro: The Matoniaceae rank is a family of extinct seed ferns, a group of ancient plants that flourished during the Carboniferous period. This family is characterized by its distinctive, strap-like foliage and cone-like reproductive structures. The Matoniaceae family is considered to be one of the most primitive and ancient of the modern fern families. Fossils of these plants have been found in various parts of the world, including Europe and North America.
